类 AbstractRpcApiDoc<T extends IMethod>

java.lang.Object
com.github.hsindumas.stagger.model.AbstractRpcApiDoc<T>
类型参数:
T - the type of method doc
所有已实现的接口:
IDoc, Serializable, Comparable<AbstractRpcApiDoc<T>>
直接已知子类:
GrpcApiDoc, RpcApiDoc
public abstract class AbstractRpcApiDoc<T extends IMethod> extends Object implements Serializable, IDoc, Comparable<AbstractRpcApiDoc<T>>
Abstract API Doc.
另请参阅:
